variants: Mohammad Sayad is a seasoned potion critic who holds a Potion Critic License, demonstrating his authority in the field. His research has been published in Lilac Passage Books, contributing significantly to the literature on potions. He benefitted from the mentorship of Parisa Khorasani, who provided critical guidance during his academic development. The Celestial Muse Committee has been a primary funding source for his innovative projects, recognizing his work's potential. Furthermore, he is actively involved as a Promoter of Fossil Road EcoWatch, where he works to promote environmental sustainability.
